SEARCH
Package dev.deepcore.challenge.world

Class WorldResetManager

java.lang.Object
dev.deepcore.challenge.world.WorldResetManager
public final class WorldResetManager extends Object
Manages world lifecycle operations for run resets and lobby/disco behavior.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    WorldResetManager(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ChallengeSessionWorldBridge challengeSessionWorldBridge)
    Creates a manager coordinating world operations for one plugin instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cleanupNonDefaultWorldsOnStartup()
    Cleans up stale non-default worlds when the server starts.
    void
    enforceLobbyWorldPolicies()
    Applies peaceful lobby policies to all configured lobby worlds.

    Starts disco preview visuals/effects around the provided center location.

    Ensures required run worlds and optional lobby worlds are loaded.

    Sets the active lobby world by selector key.

    Picks one configured lobby world to use as the active lobby destination.

    Returns whether the plugin should spawn players in lobby worlds by default.

    Stops all disco preview audio and removes active disco displays.

    Teleports online players to the currently active lobby world spawn.

  • Constructor Details

    • WorldResetManager

      public WorldResetManager(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, ChallengeSessionWorldBridge challengeSessionWorldBridge)
      Creates a manager coordinating world operations for one plugin instance.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin root instance used for world APIs and config
      challengeSessionWorldBridge - bridge to challenge session world hooks

  • Method Details

    • ensureThreeWorldsLoaded

      public void ensureThreeWorldsLoaded()
      Ensures required run worlds and optional lobby worlds are loaded.

    • cleanupNonDefaultWorldsOnStartup

      public void cleanupNonDefaultWorldsOnStartup()
      Cleans up stale non-default worlds when the server starts.

    • resetThreeWorlds

      public void resetThreeWorlds(org.bukkit.command.CommandSender sender)
      Performs full overworld/nether/end reset while moving players to lobby.
      Parameters:
      sender - command sender requesting the world reset

    • enforceLobbyWorldPolicies

      public void enforceLobbyWorldPolicies()
      Applies peaceful lobby policies to all configured lobby worlds.

    • selectRandomLobbyWorld

      public org.bukkit.World selectRandomLobbyWorld()
      Picks one configured lobby world to use as the active lobby destination.
      Returns:
      selected active lobby world, or null when no lobby world could load

    • selectLobbyWorld

      public org.bukkit.World selectLobbyWorld(String selector)
      Sets the active lobby world by selector key.
      Parameters:
      selector - one of limbo, overworld, or nether
      Returns:
      selected world, or null when selector is invalid or world could not be loaded

    • teleportOnlinePlayersToActiveLobby

      public int teleportOnlinePlayersToActiveLobby()
      Teleports online players to the currently active lobby world spawn.
      Returns:
      count of players teleported

    • ensureDiscoPreviewEffects

      public void ensureDiscoPreviewEffects(org.bukkit.Location center)
      Starts disco preview visuals/effects around the provided center location.
      Parameters:
      center - center location used for disco preview effects

    • stopDiscoPreviewAudio

      public void stopDiscoPreviewAudio()
      Stops all disco preview audio and removes active disco displays.

    • shouldSpawnInLimboByDefault

      public boolean shouldSpawnInLimboByDefault()
      Returns whether the plugin should spawn players in lobby worlds by default.
      Returns:
      true when default spawn-in-lobby behavior is enabled

    • getConfiguredLimboSpawn

      public org.bukkit.Location getConfiguredLimboSpawn()

    • isLobbyWorld

      public boolean isLobbyWorld(org.bukkit.World world)

    • getCurrentOverworld

      public org.bukkit.World getCurrentOverworld()

    • isCurrentOverworldDiscoVariant

      public boolean isCurrentOverworldDiscoVariant()
